reasoning: XLK -2.86% + XLF -2.29% + XLE -1.75% = broad-based risk-off rotation. All three major sectors down >0.5%, aligned in same direction. Tech and financials both underperforming SPY to downside, signaling institutional shift away from growth/cyclicals. No divergence or safe-haven support. Breadth is broad (all sectors selling together), not narrow. High-conviction bearish bias with strong sector internals confirmation.
key_observations: XLK: -2.86% — Tech selling harder than SPY, risk-off leadership
XLF: -2.29% — Financials also down, no bank support for broad market
XLE: -1.75% — Energy slight outperformer but still negative; no refuge bid
Overall rotation: Risk-off confirmed — all sectors down together = broad institutional exit, not localized weakness
